message:
test(ffs-inode): proptest bump_inode_version adds-n property

Add proptest_bump_inode_version_adds_n: bumping the inode version `n`
times must add exactly `n` to the combined u64 (version_hi:version_lo),
modulo 2^64.

Existing unit tests pin specific values — zero, u32::MAX, u64::MAX —
but no property test exercised the full arithmetic chain across the
u32 boundary. A regression that mishandled the u32-to-u64 carry
(e.g., not propagating into version_hi, or double-incrementing on
overflow) would slip past the unit-test grid but be caught here for
any non-trivial initial state.

128 cases over (initial_lo, initial_hi, n in 0..=64); all 113
ffs-inode tests pass.
